situational_context: Early rebuild phase: first significant effort (gravel ride, load 57 on Apr 25) absorbed well — training readiness rebounded to 76, HRV stable at 38. ACWR elevated at 1.44 due to spike against low chronic base (22.7). Weight trending down (-2.3 kg over 12 days to 104.6 kg). Activity profile remains dominated by e-bike commuting (3 sur-site days/week, load 17-24/day) with occasional structured sessions. Baby-driven life constraints continuing — missed sessions expected and acceptable. Chronic load at 1.4% of 2023 historical peak (1608); rebuild trajectory positive but very early.

recommendations.text: Keep all sessions at Z1-Z2 this week to let ACWR normalize below 1.3. No intervals or tempo until ACWR < 1.2.
recommendations.measurable: ACWR below 1.3 by May 2 when the gravel spike exits the 7-day window

recommendations.text: Increase daily protein intake toward 150g target — currently averaging 120g/day (80% adherence). Add a protein-rich snack or increase lunch portion.
If commuting sur site Thursday, prefer e-bike over gravel to avoid another ACWR spike. If gravel chosen (suffer >30), reduce Friday session to Z1 recovery only.
recommendations.measurable: Thursday commute suffer score <20 if e-bike; adjust Friday plan if >30

markers_to_watch.reason: Gravel ride (load 57) exits 7-day window on May 2; moderate planned sessions should bring ratio back to safe zone
Currently at 22.7 — sustained moderate sessions will gradually build the denominator

markers_to_watch.threshold: Fat% fluctuated 27.7-30.3% between two readings 2 days apart
markers_to_watch.reason: Withings impedance sensitive to hydration; true trend requires 3+ consistent readings at same time of day
